transcription.text: When you finally grab hold of the snack you have been waiting for, Maya Food Bomb Salted Egg Fish Kimbap. Unique Singapore snack you must try. Crispy. Addictive. Delicious. So good you get hooked. This is Maya Food Bomb's new fish skin bomb.
